Girls Inc. × DYWork® Partnership Brief

A Zero‑Cost Fundraising Partnership for Girls Inc.

The Funding Reality

Girls Inc of Tarrant County

Girls-serving organizations are being asked to do more with less.

Today, 91% of nonprofits report direct financial strain. Grant dollars are increasingly restricted while demand for girls’ services, mental health support, and social-emotional programming continues to rise.

Staff are left to absorb the gap.

Bold, smart, and strong girls deserve programs that are not held hostage to funding uncertainty.

The Opportunity

Unrestricted revenue with zero cost to Girls Inc.

DYWork® is a social enterprise that uses emotional wellness apparel to drive behavioral change and community impact.

Through this partnership, DYWork® provides co-branded apparel to participating Girls Inc. chapters at no cost. Girls Inc. sells the apparel, and 100% of every dollar earned stays with the chapter.

Donated apparel becomes flexible funding for the programs, people, and girls behind the mission.

Inventory cost None
Upfront investment None
Revenue share None

How the Fundraising Model Works

The mechanics, in full.

DYWork® partners with certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE) and Women Business Enterprise (WBE) companies to produce mission-aligned emotional wellness apparel. The apparel is donated directly to Girls Inc. chapters and resold to girls, families, staff, alumni, volunteers, board members, corporate partners, and community supporters.

Cost to Girls Inc.

$0

Apparel

Donated to Girls Inc.

Sale Price

$25 / shirt

Revenue Kept

100%

Revenue Type

Unrestricted

Dallas County

3,500

girls + families

Tarrant County

2,000

girls + families

Revenue Potential

$387,000

at full participation

This opportunity extends beyond direct program participants. It can reach families, staff, alumni, volunteers, board members, corporate partners, community supporters, and local advocates who believe in the Girls Inc. mission.

The Deeper Partnership

Investing in the people and programs behind bold, smart, and strong girls.

Beyond revenue, DYWork® creates a deeper partnership with Girls Inc. by supporting both the staff who carry the mission and the girls growing through it. The apparel creates the entry point. The deeper impact comes through emotional wellness tools, reflective practice, and programs that help girls build confidence, resilience, boundaries, and a stronger sense of self.

For Staff

  • — Emotional skill assessment
  • — Leadership development workshops
  • — Team effectiveness and alignment
  • — Personal and career development

For Girls

  • — Emotional skills assessment
  • — Structured curriculum
  • — Facilitator and participant guides
  • — Practice and reflection resources

Professional Certifications

★ Certified Minority-Owned Business ★ CliftonStrengths ★ Five Dysfunctions of a Team ★ FourSight ★ SDI Core Strengths

Why This, Why Now

A timely solution for sustainable impact.

Girls Inc. chapters need flexible funding that can move with the real needs of the girls, families, and communities they serve.

This partnership creates an immediate, zero-risk path to unrestricted revenue while opening the door to deeper emotional wellness support for both staff and girls.

It is simple, mission-aligned, and built to help Girls Inc. keep investing in the work that matters most.
